* Take maintainership

Tested in poudriere for 11-i386, 11-amd64, 12-i386 and 12-amd64. Passes portlint (other than the mention of an NLS knob, I cannot see a way to toggle NLS in workrave's configure script though).

I am not making any changes to the port other than updating it.
